settings.about_blurb: "A storyteller shaped by late-night conversations and sunlit kitchens, keeping a record of the people who inspire her."
settings.body: Global settings for the One Day site.

articles.title: Test new entry
articles.hook: Test test test meow meow meow

articles.title: Monday Mornings
articles.hook: "A cinematographer's call to honor your interests."
articles.body:
## On location

It is Monday morning. I am on location shooting a documentary on the Pinot Noir artisan wineries in the Willamette Valley of Oregon. I have exciting adventures with my camera and meet the most interesting people wherever I work.

## The question

So, what do YOU want YOUR Monday mornings to look like?

## Just do it

Just do it. Honor YOUR interests.

- Ben Garvey, Cinematographer
- Portland, Oregon

articles.title: Quiet Mornings
articles.hook: "How dawn rituals became a shelter for creativity."
articles.body:
## The first light

There is a small corner of the kitchen where the morning sun rests for ten minutes. In that light, ideas arrive softly and without pressure.

## A cup and a page

The practice is simple: boil water, pour tea, write three lines. Those lines have turned into chapters, collaborations, and new friendships.

## Carrying it forward

The ritual is shared now, passed from one storyteller to the next.

articles.title: Keeping Promises
articles.hook: An ode to the people who stay when the work is hard.
articles.body:
## The circle

A group of friends met once a month for six years. The only rule was to show up with a story, even if the story felt unfinished.

## The vow

By the fourth year, their meetings became a lifeline. They learned that keeping promises to each other was also keeping promises to themselves.

## The invitation

Join the circle, even if the story is unfinished.

articles.title: After the Show
articles.hook: Test test test meow meow meow
articles.body:
## The quiet stage

The lights fade, the audience leaves, and what remains is the echo of a promise: make something honest.

## The ledger

Every artist keeps a private list of the nights that mattered. This was one of them.

## The next morning

The story becomes a memory, and the memory becomes fuel.
